compiled_truth.summary: A rational lead who prefers data and clear boundaries.
compiled_truth.intent: Clarify whether the project is worth continued investment.

attitude.label: cautious
attitude.reason: Wants clear direction before moving forward.

timeline.event_summary: Discussed project scope and resource allocation.

tool_input.conversation_goal: Simulate a follow-up conversation about whether the project should continue.
tool_input.scenario_context: A one-on-one discussion where we want a real read on judgment without creating pressure.
tool_input.starting_user_message: I want to hear your honest judgment on whether this line is worth continuing.

persona_read.current_state: Open to discussing it, but will first test whether the scope is actually clear.
persona_read.likely_intent: Figure out whether this is worth continued investment and who would really own it.
persona_read.response_style: State the judgment first, then the boundary.

simulation.opening_assessment: If the opening is restrained and fact-based, he is likely to stay analytical.

simulated_turns.user_move: I want to hear your honest judgment on whether this line is worth continuing.
simulated_turns.likely_response: It could be, but only if the scope and owner are clear enough to avoid diffuse effort.
simulated_turns.why: He usually gives a cautious judgment first, then defines conditions.

simulated_turns.user_move: What would make it worth continuing from your perspective?
simulated_turns.likely_response: A clear owner, a believable end-to-end path, and proof the team will not be spread too thin.
simulated_turns.why: He values boundaries and resourcing more than ambition language.

likely_pushbacks: He may push back if the conversation becomes aspirational instead of concrete.
recommended_replies: Acknowledge the caution and keep the discussion on ownership and real constraints.
danger_zones: Do not frame the conversation as a loyalty test.
if_conversation_goes_well: Ask him to define the minimum conditions for continued investment.

keep_doing: Ask for the judgment first, then the conditions.
avoid: Do not push for commitment too early.
recovery_moves: If he becomes reserved, restate that you are only trying to confirm the real constraints.
